recommendation.summary: Recovery is poor. Focus on restoration before high training stress.
actions: Shift to recovery day or reduce session volume by 30-40%.
Avoid additional high-load training until recovery rebounds.

persisted_record.title: Modify Today's Workout for Better Recovery
persisted_record.description: To improve your recovery score and overall health, reduce the intensity and duration of today's workout. Aim for low-impact exercises such as walking, stretching, or yoga instead of your usual routine. This adjustment will help manage your high stress levels and low heart rate variability (HRV), both of which are crucial for recovery.
